blocks.body: Alternative questions (alternative questions) are questions that offer a choice between two or more options connected by the conjunction or (or). Unlike Yes/No questions, here you need to choose one of the proposed options.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Alternative questions ‚ÄĒ a question with a choice between options through OR.", "Structure: as Yes/No question + or + alternative.", "Answer ‚ÄĒ choose one option, NOT Yes/No.", "With do/does/did: Do you walk or drive? Did she buy A or B?", "With to be: Is it hot or cold? Are you A or B?", "With modals: Can you swim or dive? will you come today or tomorrow? (both).", "–Ď—Ė–Ľ—Ć—ą–Ķ –≤–į—Ä—Ė–į–Ĺ—ā—Ė–≤: –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ–į –∑–į–Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ—É–≤–į—ā–ł 3+ –≤–į—Ä—Ė–į–Ĺ—ā–ł —á–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–∑ –ļ–ĺ–ľ—É + or.", "–ó Wh-—Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į–ľ–ł: Which do you prefer ‚ÄĒ A or B?", "–í—Ė–ī–Ņ–ĺ–≤—Ė–ī—Ė: –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ –≤–į—Ä—Ė–į–Ĺ—ā / Neither (–∂–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–Ķ) / Both (–ĺ–Ī–ł–ī–≤–į).", "Intonation - falls on the last option." ] }
